overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned, graffiti-covered hospital or medical facility in a horror video game. The player moves slowly from a small utility room through an office area into a large dilapidated ward with hospital beds and medical equipment, creating an eerie, atmospheric experience.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned utility room with dirty sinks and shelves

agents.ego_description: slowly examining the utility room, looking at the dirty sinks and metal shelves

entered.detail: two dirty white porcelain sinks with rust stains and debris
black metal shelves mounted above the sinks holding various items
tall white refrigerator with black handle showing signs of decay
white tiled walls covered in black spray paint graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a small, enclosed utility room with two dirty sinks and metal shelves. The walls are covered in graffiti. The player slowly looks around the space, examining the decaying fixtures and a white refrigerator before moving toward an adjacent area.

scene_state.functional_zone: small office with desk and computer

events.description: moving from the utility room into a small office area with a desk

agents.ego_description: moving past the refrigerator into a darker office space with a computer desk

entered.detail: cluttered wooden desk with papers and objects scattered on surface
black CRT monitor sitting on the desk
black office chair pushed up to the desk
tall cabinet with glass doors containing boxes and files

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the utility room into a narrow office space containing a wooden desk with a computer monitor and office chair. The lighting becomes darker as the player approaches a doorway leading to a larger space, passing a metal storage cabinet.

scene_state.functional_zone: large abandoned hospital ward with multiple beds and medical equipment

events.description: entering the large hospital ward from the narrow office corridor
approaching a bright portable LED work light standing in the middle of the ward

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through the large ward, panning around to examine hospital beds and debris

entered.detail: multiple metal-frame hospital beds with dirty mattresses scattered throughout the ward
empty black wheelchair sitting in the middle of the room
blue fabric curtains on metal rails between bed areas
metal lockers tipped over on their sides
bright rectangular LED light on a tripod stand illuminating the floor
large windows covered in colorful graffiti and posters

segments.scene_description: The player enters a vast, open hospital ward filled with abandoned beds, wheelchairs, and medical equipment. The space is littered with debris and graffiti-covered walls. The camera pans around the eerie environment, passing a bright LED work light before approaching windows covered in colorful graffiti at the far end of the ward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, decaying utility room into a vast, derelict hospital ward. It begins by scanning the graffiti-covered walls and dirty sinks of a small service area before gliding toward an adjacent opening. As the camera passes through a narrow office space, the lighting dims around a wooden desk and metal cabinet, creating a sense of constriction before the view opens wide. The scene then expands into a massive ward filled with abandoned beds and wheelchairs, where the camera pans across debris-strewn floors and a bright LED work light. Finally, the movement carries the viewer toward the far end of the hall, approaching windows obscured by layers of colorful graffiti.
